name: dnsgen
title: dnsgen
summary:
DNS generator
This package provides a generator of a combination of domain names from the
provided input. Combinations are created based on wordlist. Custom words are
extracted per execution.

When the engagement is in the install phase, use dnsgen as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `dnsgen [options] [args]` as documented upstream for dnsgen.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair dnsgen with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `dnsgen --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
